prompt: Create a vertical portrait in polished hard-boiled graphic novel concept-art style inspired by Rockstar Games key art: a stern adult Western gunslinger fills the lower 75% of the frame, viewed from a low heroic angle, centered and cropped from thighs upward. The top 25% of the image must be strictly empty solid blood red, with no text or objects. The character has slicked-back dark hair and a deliberately featureless flat warm tan rectangular face area obscuring all facial features. Pose: both arms raised, each hand holding one ornate long-barrel revolver vertically beside the head, barrels angled slightly outward; exactly 2 visible revolvers, one in each hand, with engraved metal details and ivory grips. Attire: cream white long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled cuffs, dark blue neckerchief tied at the collar, high-waisted black trousers, wide double leather gun belt with two large buckles, and one visible brown holster on the left hip. Setting: stylized desert canyon at sunset behind the figure, with jagged red rock formations and exactly 6 visible saguaro cacti distributed near the lower left and lower right edges. Use dramatic golden rim light, deep black shadows, heavy ink-like outlines, painterly poster texture, high contrast, cinematic Western mood, no typography, no logo, no watermark.
